articles.title: Quote of the Day by Taylor Swift on how you treat people: ‘No matter what happens in life…’
articles.description: Kindness is a long-term investment that builds over time. In difficult situations, reflect on how you wish to be remembered. Legacy is defined by how you treat others, emphasizing character over achievement.

articles.title: Mann ki Baat: PM Modi urges citizens to jointly face challenges emerging due to West Asia war
articles.description: In his Mann ki Baat, the Prime Minister said a "fierce war" has been raging in "our neighbourhood" for over a month.

articles.title: War is profitable, time to get richer: 'Rich Dad Poor Dad' author Robert Kiyosaki
articles.description: Amid rising Iran-US-Israel tensions and surging oil prices, Robert Kiyosaki warned that wars, while tragic, are financially profitable for some. He highlighted inflation risks, rising debt, and wealth erosion, urging financial education and disciplined investing. Kiyosaki also reiterated that market crashes could create opportunities for prepared investors.

articles.title: TVK chief Vijay to contest from Perambur, Tiruchi East constituencies
articles.description: TVK general secretary ‘Bussy’ N. Anand will contest from T. Nagar in Chennai, while K.A. Sengottaiyan will test the waters from his home turf, Gobichettipalayam. Aadhav Arjuna will contest from Villivakkam, K.G. Arunraaj from Tiruchengode and C.T.R. Nirmal Kumar from Thirupparankundram.

articles.title: TVK chief Vijay to contest Tamil Nadu elections from Perambur and Trichy East
articles.description: TVK chief Vijay to contest Tamil Nadu elections from Perambur and Trichy East

articles.title: ACB traps Panchayat Raj AEE, Works Inspector in Vizianagaram
articles.description: The accused reportedly demanded a ₹1.30 lakh bribe to clear the pending bills for the construction works taken up under the Gram Panchayat General Funds and the 15th Finance Commission Fund

articles.description: The Kerala Legislative Assembly elections are scheduled to take place on April 9, 2026 and will be held in a single phase to select 140 members of the Assembly

topStories.title: Reza Pahlavi wishes to ‘Make Iran Great Again’ by startups instead of suicide bombers - Here's what he said
topStories.description: Reza Pahlavi, exiled son of Iran's last shah, urged Washington to intensify military actions against Tehran. He envisions a democratic Iran, free from nuclear threats and terrorism, proposing the Iran Prosperity Project for national recovery and a strategic US-Iran partnership to boost the economy.

dailyNews.title: Illinois knocks off Iowa to reach Final Four after buzzer malfunction delay
dailyNews.description: Illinois rolled past Iowa in Saturday's Elite Eight in the South Regional, punching the Fighting Illini's first Final Four ticket since 2005 despite a buzzer delay.

dailyNews.title: Slain college student’s mother vows ‘fight for justice’ after illegal immigrant charged in Chicago killing
dailyNews.description: Sheridan Gorman, 18, was allegedly shot and killed near Loyola University Chicago by Jose Medina-Medina, an illegal immigrant from Venezuela, according to authorities.

dailyNews.title: Stephen A Smith says there is 'no excuse' for 'biological men' competing in women's sports
dailyNews.description: While voicing support for women's sports, commentator Stephen A. Smith suggested transgender women competing in female sports harms biological females.

dailyNews.title: New study reveals most stressed US states, and they aren't where you'd expect
dailyNews.description: A new WalletHub study ranks Louisiana as the most stressed U.S. state in 2026, citing poverty, limited health care access and high unemployment rates.

dailyNews.title: Nate Smith admits he threw a drink at Morgan Wallen on stage, calling him 'a very forgiving person'
dailyNews.description: Nate Smith admits he threw a drink at Morgan Wallen on stage during their tour, saying Wallen forgave him and that he thought he was being funny.

dailyNews.title: Hormone therapy boosts weight loss drug results by 35% in women, study finds
dailyNews.description: A Mayo Clinic study suggests postmenopausal women lost 35% more weight combining hormone therapy with tirzepatide, though experts urge caution on the findings.

dailyNews.title: Far-left California congressional candidate clashes with Trump supporters in heated exchange
dailyNews.description: Shonique Williams confronted Trump supporters at Cerritos College, where a heated exchange over politics, race and policy escalated into a campus free speech area.

dailyNews.title: Fans are demanding these 10 vanished ’80s and ’90s snacks return to store shelves
dailyNews.description: Childhood nostalgia hits hard as fans revisit 10 beloved discontinued snacks from the '80s and '90s, from Planters PB Crisps to Cheetos Paws.

dailyNews.title: DAVID MARCUS: Hasan Piker, useful idiot fashionistas want to make America into commie Cuba
dailyNews.description: Podcaster Hasan Piker visited Cuba and claimed people were partying despite daily rolling blackouts, while staying in a five-star, generator-powered hotel.

dailyNews.title: ‘No Kings’ Protests Decry Trump and His Agenda
dailyNews.description: Thousands of organized demonstrations stretched across the country. Minnesota was a focal point of the protests after a tumultuous immigration crackdown.

dailyNews.title: No Kings Protests Held Across the U.S.: Photos and Videos
dailyNews.description: It’s the third time that the coalition behind the “No Kings” movement has organized events to protest President Trump and his policies. In the United States, more than 3,000 demonstrations were planned.

dailyNews.title: F.B.I. Said to Dig Up Old Investigative Files on Democratic Lawmaker
dailyNews.description: The urgent instructions at the Trump administration’s behest to gather and relay the files on Representative Eric Swalwell have alarmed some career law enforcement officials.

dailyNews.title: Record Number of T.S.A. Employees Called Out on Friday
dailyNews.description: President Trump signed a memo late Friday ordering the Department of Homeland Security to restore pay to airport screeners.

dailyNews.title: Is Iran a Political Problem for Trump? Tell Me How Long the War Lasts.
dailyNews.description: Historically, quagmire abroad and high prices at home are the ingredients of a failed presidency.

dailyNews.title: How the big oil and gas CEOs think the Iran war supply disruption will play out
dailyNews.description: The oil industry's grim outlook for global oil and gas supplies stands in contrast to the Trump administration's promise that the disruption is short term.

dailyNews.description: Millions of protesters in cities from coast to coast filled streets for the latest "No Kings" protest against the Trump administration.

dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump announced "major combat operations" against Iran on Feb. 28, with massive joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.

dailyNews.description: Trump is hosting a UFC fight at the White House to celebrate his 80th birthday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.
